name: Taylor
ai_summary: Taylor from Glendale, AZ has 16MO experience with elementary, substitute, nanny, and education student background. They are patient, enjoy arts/crafts, and seek part-time work to balance with parenting.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Taylor. I would love to work for up kid. I've worked with kids basically my whole life. I always knew I wanted to be a teacher so I started pursuing early childhood education while working for the Washington Elementary School District. I was a teacher's assistant back then working in the CC a special needs program but they were in desperate need for educators and teachers.
 Teachers. And so I ended up getting my emergency certification substitute certification. And so I kind of put a pause on my Early Childhood degree to do that and so I did that for a while, then I started to do career Nanny work and I love that just being like one-on-one in the home with kids, being able to take them out and do activities. But now most recently, in present time, I am a first-time mom. My son is 16 months old and
 And I love being home with him, but I would like the flexibility of picking up a shift here and there and, you know, having some kind of me time, but also still Philly Mike up and doing what makes me happy.
transcripts.q4: Hi again, so I am located in Glendale Arizona. The ZIP code is 8530 for and I'm willing to travel, I would say probably about like 20 to 30 miles.
transcripts.q5: Hi again. So my husband works from home and he does have a flexible schedule. But with that being said, I had said in one of my previous videos that I do have a 16 month old son. So I do still enjoy being home with him and doing the fun mommy and Son activities. So right now, I am looking for part-time.
